seo.title: Expert Carpenter in Dallas, TX | Custom Woodwork & Repairs | Carpenter Cove
seo.description: Carpenter Cove offers premium carpentry services in Dallas, TX. From custom cabinets to trim work, we bring precision and artistry to every project. Call (214) 421-0551.

hero.headline: Bringing Your Woodwork Vision to Life
hero.subheadline: From intricate custom cabinetry to elegant trim, we craft spaces that blend beauty and function.

featureSections.title: Tailored Cabinets That Transform Your Space
featureSections.body: Our custom cabinets are designed to fit your exact specifications, maximizing storage and enhancing the aesthetic of any room.
bullets: Built to your dimensions and style
featureSections.cardBody: Every cabinet is constructed with time-honored joinery techniques for durability that spans generations.

featureSections.title: Elegant Trim That Defines Your Home
featureSections.body: From crown molding to baseboards, our precision trim work adds character and value to your property.
bullets: Primed and painted or stained to match
featureSections.cardBody: We measure twice, cut once — ensuring every piece aligns flawlessly with your walls and ceilings.

whyChooseUs.title: Master Craftsmanship
whyChooseUs.description: Our team combines traditional woodworking skills with modern techniques for superior results.

whyChooseUs.title: Personalized Service
whyChooseUs.description: We listen to your vision and tailor every project to your unique needs and style.

whyChooseUs.title: Reliable & Punctual
whyChooseUs.description: We respect your time and complete projects on schedule with minimal disruption.

whyChooseUs.title: Quality Materials
whyChooseUs.description: We source only the finest woods and hardware to ensure lasting beauty and function.

testimonials.quote: Carpenter Cove transformed our kitchen with custom cabinets that are both beautiful and functional. The attention to detail was outstanding.
testimonials.author: Sarah M.

testimonials.quote: They installed crown molding throughout our living room and the results are stunning. Professional, clean, and on time.
testimonials.author: James R.

testimonials.quote: From the first consultation to the final walkthrough, Carpenter Cove exceeded our expectations. Our new built-in shelves are a work of art.
testimonials.author: Emily T.

cta.headline: Ready to Start Your Project?
cta.subheadline: Contact us today for a free consultation and estimate.

servicesPage.intro: From custom cabinetry to detailed trim work, Carpenter Cove offers a full range of carpentry services in Dallas, TX. Each project is handled with precision and care.

services.title: Custom Cabinetry
services.shortDescription: Design and build custom cabinets for kitchens, bathrooms, and more.
services.longDescription: We create bespoke cabinets that maximize storage and elevate your home's design. Using premium materials and expert joinery, our cabinets are built to last a lifetime.
benefits: Personalized design to fit your space
Wide range of wood species and finishes

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We discuss your needs, measure your space, and review design options.

process.title: Design & Material Selection
process.description: We create detailed plans and help you choose woods, stains, and hardware.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Our team installs your cabinets with precision, ensuring perfect alignment and function.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build custom cabinets?
faqs.answer: Typically 4-6 weeks from design approval to installation, depending on complexity.

faqs.question: What types of wood do you use?
faqs.answer: We offer oak, maple, cherry, walnut, and more. We'll help you choose the best option for your style and budget.

services.title: Trim & Molding
services.shortDescription: Install crown molding, baseboards, and decorative trim.
services.longDescription: Add elegance and value to your home with expert trim installation. Our team handles everything from simple baseboards to intricate crown molding and wainscoting.
benefits: Primed and painted or stained finish

process.title: Assessment
process.description: We evaluate your rooms and recommend trim styles that complement your decor.

process.title: Material Preparation
process.description: We select and prepare materials, ensuring they acclimate to your home.

process.title: Installation & Finishing
process.description: We install trim with precision, caulk, and paint or stain for a flawless look.

faqs.question: Can you match existing trim?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can replicate or complement your existing trim profiles for a cohesive look.

faqs.question: How much does trim installation cost?
faqs.answer: Costs vary by room size and complexity. Contact us for a free estimate.

services.title: Built-In Shelving
services.shortDescription: Custom built-in shelves for books, decor, and storage.
services.longDescription: Maximize your space with custom built-in shelving that fits your exact needs. Whether for a home library, entertainment center, or display unit, we design and build shelves that blend seamlessly with your home.
benefits: Custom fit for any nook or wall

process.title: Design
process.description: We work with you to design shelves that meet your storage needs and style.

process.title: Construction
process.description: We build your shelving in our workshop for precision, then finish on-site.

process.title: Installation
process.description: We install the shelving securely, ensuring it is level and perfectly aligned.

faqs.question: Can you add lighting to built-ins?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We can integrate LED strip lighting or puck lights for a dramatic effect.

faqs.question: Do you offer floating shelves?
faqs.answer: Yes, we build and install floating shelves that appear to hover, with hidden brackets for support.

services.title: Door & Window Installation
services.shortDescription: Expert installation of interior and exterior doors and windows.
services.longDescription: Proper door and window installation is crucial for energy efficiency and security. Our team ensures a precise fit and smooth operation for all types of doors and windows.

process.title: Measurement & Selection
process.description: We take accurate measurements and help you choose the right doors or windows.

process.title: Preparation
process.description: We remove old units and prepare the opening for a perfect fit.

process.title: Installation & Sealing
process.description: We install and seal the unit, ensuring it is level, plumb, and weathertight.

faqs.question: Do you install both interior and exterior doors?
faqs.answer: Yes, we install all types including prehung, French, sliding, and pocket doors.

faqs.question: How long does a door installation take?
faqs.answer: Most installations are completed in a single day. Complex projects may take longer.

about.headline: About Carpenter Cove
about.mission: To deliver exceptional carpentry that enhances the beauty and function of every space we touch.
story: Carpenter Cove was founded in Dallas with a passion for woodworking and a commitment to quality. Our founder, a master carpenter with over 15 years of experience, started the company to bring custom craftsmanship to homeowners and businesses in the area. From the beginning, we focused on precision, integrity, and personalized service.

Today, we are a team of skilled artisans who take pride in every project, big or small. We believe that great carpentry transforms a house into a home, and we strive to exceed expectations with every cut, joint, and finish.

coreValues.title: Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: We honor the art of woodworking with meticulous attention to detail.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We are honest, transparent, and fair in all our dealings.

coreValues.title: Customer Focus
coreValues.description: Your satisfaction is our top priority. We listen and deliver.

coreValues.title: Continuous Improvement
coreValues.description: We stay updated on the latest techniques and materials to serve you better.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Ready to discuss your project? Call or fill out the form below.
